config.script:
'kantor #include "50523"
'rabaty #include "50524"
'srvDate #include "50126"
'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101"
'nx_get_globprofile_obj #include "50203" #include "50122"
'-------------------------------- 'tworzy nowego klienta w systemie '-------------------------------- function createClient(oClient): createClient = false
if checkClientData(oClient) then trans_.var(APPVAR_KLIENT_TYPE) = clng(oClient.ePrywat) dim pKlient: set pKlient = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT) with pKlient .strNazwa = oClient.strNazwa .strImie = oClient.strImie .strNazwisko = oClient.strNazwisko .strSkrot = oClient.strSkrot .strNIP = oClient.strNIP set .pGrupaKlient = getGrupaKlient(oClient.strNazwaGrupy) .strUlica = oClient.strUlica .strNrDomu = oClient.strNrDomu .strNrLokalu = oClient.strNrLokalu .strKod = oClient.strKod set .pMiejscowosc = getMiejscowosc(oClient.strMiejscowosc) .strEmail = oClient.strEmail .strTel1 = oClient.strTel1 .strTel2 = oClient.strTel2 .strTel3 = oClient.strTel3 .strTel4 = oClient.strTel4 .strFax = oClient.strFax '.strCecha1 = oClient.strCecha1 '.strCecha2 = oClient.strCecha2 '.strCecha3 = oClient.strCecha3 .ePrywat = CLng(oClient.ePrywat) end with 'messagebox "ok", "Zakończono wysyłanie", vbOKOnly, vbInformation if not trans_.saveobjects() then exit function end if else 'messagebox "sprawdzilem klienta i mi sie nie podoba", "Zakończono wysyłanie", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if createClient = true end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ 'sprawdza poprawność wprowadzonych danych dla obiektu klienta '------------------------------------------------------------ function checkClientData(byVal oClient): checkClientData = false 'indeks klienta => automatyczna numeracja dim strWart: strWart = nx_get_globprofile_value(GLOBPROF_KLIENT_AUTONUM) if strWart <> "1" then exit function end if 'pola wymagane if oClient.strNazwa = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strSkrot = "" and oClient.ePrywat = N5KLIENT_FIRMA then exit function end if if oClient.ePrywat <> N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA and oClient.ePrywat <> N5KLIENT_FIRMA then exit function end if if oClient.strNazwaGrupy <> "" then dim idGrupa: idGrupa = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"strNazwa = '" + oClient.strNazwaGrupy + "'") if idGrupa = clng(0) then exit function end if else exit function end if if oClient.strNIP = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strUlica = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strNrDomu = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strKod = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strMiejscowosc <> "" then dim idMiejsc: idMiejsc = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC,"strNazwa = '" + oClient.strMiejscowosc + "'") if idMiejsc = clng(0) then exit function end if else exit function end if if oClient.strEmail = "" then exit function end if if oClient.strTel1 = "" then exit function end if checkClientData = true end function
'---------------------------- 'zwraca obiekt grupy klientów '---------------------------- function getGrupaKlient(byval strNazwaGrupy): set getGrupaKlient = nothing dim idGrupa: idGrupa = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"strNazwa = '" + strNazwaGrupy + "'") if idGrupa > clng(0) then set getGrupaKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,idGrupa) end if end function
'-------------------------- 'zwraca obiekt miejscowości '-------------------------- function getMiejscowosc(byval strMiejscowosc): set getMiejscowosc = nothing dim idMiejsc: idMiejsc = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC,"strNazwa = '" + strMiejscowosc + "'") if idMiejsc > clng(0) then set getMiejscowosc = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC,idMiejsc) end if end function
'----------------- 'tworzy zamówienie '----------------- function putOrder(byval intClientID, oOrderLine, oOrderInfo): putOrder = -1 dim idRejDok, idSposPlat 'sprawdzamy klienta if trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"IdObj = " + CStr(intClientID)) <= 0 then exit function end if
'sprawdzamy rejestr idRejDok = getRejByNazwa(oOrderInfo.strRejestrDok) if idRejDok <= 0 then exit function end if
'sprawdzamy sposób płatności idSposPlat = getSposPlatByNazwa(oOrderInfo.strSposobPlat) if idSposPlat <= 0 then exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRejDok
dim oZam: set oZam = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE) with oZam set .pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,intClientID) set .pSposobPlatnosci = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT,idSposPlat) .dDataWyst = oOrderInfo.dDataWyst .dDataReal = oOrderInfo.dDataReal .strUwagi = oOrderInfo.strUwagi end with
dim oElem, oProd, oOpak, oPos, iter for each oElem in oOrderLine if oElem.intIdProdukt > clng(0) and oElem.intIdOpakowanie > clng(0) and ccur(oElem.decIlosc) > ccur(0) and ccur(oElem.decCenaZaSztuke) > ccur(0) then set oProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oElem.intIdProdukt) if oProd is nothing then exit function end if dim nLP: nLP = oProd.listOpakowania.findonid(clng(oElem.intIdOpakowanie)) if nLP > clng(0) then set oOpak = oProd.listOpakowania.get(nLP) else exit function end if set oPos = oZam.listPozycje.addnew() set oPos.pProdukt = oProd set oPos.pOpak = oOpak oPos.curIloscOpak = ccur(oElem.decIlosc) oPos.curCenaBazowaNettoWal = ccur(oElem.decCenaZaSztuke) end if next if not trans_.saveobjects() then exit function end if
putOrder = oZam.idObj end function
'------------------------------------ 'zwraca idobj rejestru o danej nazwie '------------------------------------ function getRejByNazwa(byval strRejestrDok): getRejByNazwa = clng(0) getRejByNazwa = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,"strNazwa = '" + CStr(strRejestrDok) + "'") end function
'--------------------------------------------- 'zwraca idobj sposobu płatności o danej nazwie '--------------------------------------------- function getSposPlatByNazwa(byval strRejestrDok): getSposPlatByNazwa = clng(0) getSposPlatByNazwa = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT,"strNazwa = '" + CStr(strRejestrDok) + "'") end function
'-------------------------------------------- 'zwraca dane o produktach w postaci recordset '-------------------------------------------- function getProductList(oView, oSort, oSearch) 'pobranie aktywnych magazynów dim strstrQuery, strSubstrQuery: strSubstrQuery = "" strstrQuery = "select IdObj,strNazwa from n5magazyn where mag_eAktywny = N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY" dim oRSMag: set oRSMag = trans_.createadors(strstrQuery)
dim strRec dim iter: iter = 1 do while not oRSMag.EOF strRec = "'idMagazyn" + CStr(iter) + "'=" + CStr(oRSMag(0).value) + "," + vbNewLine + "'strMagazynNazwa" + CStr(iter) + "'='" + CStr(oRSMag(1).value) + "'," + vbNewLine +_ "'intStan" + CStr(iter) + "'=(select isnull(cast(sum(gms_curIlosc) as int),cast(0 as int)) from n5gmstan where gms_pProd = vl.p_idobj and gms_pOpak = vl.c_idobj and gms_pMag = " + CStr(oRSMag(0).value) + ")" strSubstrQuery = strSubstrQuery + strRec if iter < oRSMag.recordCount then strSubstrQuery = strSubstrQuery + "," + vbNewLine end if iter = iter + 1 oRSMag.movenext loop
strstrQuery = _ "select * from " + vbNewLine +_ "(select 'longRowNumber'=(cast(row_number() over (order by vl.p_strindeks) as int)), " + vbNewLine +_ "'c_prod_idobj'=vl.p_idobj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'intIdOpakowanie'=vl.c_idobj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strIndeks'=vl.p_strindeks, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaProduktu'=vl.p_strnazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strGrupaProduktow'=gr.strNazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDetaNetto'=vl.c_curcenanetto1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDetaBrutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt1Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt1Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt2Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt2Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDeta4Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto4, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDeta4Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto4, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt5Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto5, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt5Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto5, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt6Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto6, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt6Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto6, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strVat'=vl.p_evat, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strRodzaj'=vl.p_erodzaj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strOpis'=vl.p_stropis, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha1'=vl.p_strcecha1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha2'=vl.p_strcecha2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha3'=vl.p_strcecha3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaOpakowania'=vl.c_strnazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strJednOpakowania'=j.strSkrot, " + vbNewLine +_ "'intIDGrupaProd'=vl.p_pgrupaprod, " + vbNewLine +_ "'eStatus'=vl.p_eaktywny, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaProduktuForeign'=vl.p_strnazwamiedzynarodowa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strIndeksProduktuZamiennika'=isnull((select op.p_strindeks from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania op where op.c_idobj = vl.c_pzamiennik),'brak'), " + vbNewLine +_ "'lp'=vl.coll_lp, " + vbNewLine +_ + strSubstrQuery + vbNewLine +_ #ifdef ENABLE_DB11_F ", 'strAltInx1'= isnull((select strIndeks from n5produkt where idobj=vl.p_prod_pZamiennik1),'--')" +_ #endif "from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania vl " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5grupaproduktow gr on vl.p_pgrupaprod = gr.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5jednostka j on vl.c_pJednOpak = j.idobj " + vbNewLine
if oSearch.strSearchBy <> "notuse" then
strstrQuery = strstrQuery + "where "
if oSearch.strSearchType <> "ONE" then strstrQuery = strstrQuery + " " else strstrQuery = strstrQuery + " = " end if
strstrQuery = strstrQuery + oSearch.strSearchPattern + vbNewLine
end if
strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ ") as prod " + vbNewLine
if oView.strViewType <> "all" then strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ "where longRowNumber between " + CStr(oView.intPoczatek) + " and " + CStr(oView.intKoniec) + vbNewLine end if
strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ "order by " + oSort.strKryterium + oSort.strPorzadek
trans_.message 0, 0, strstrQuery
set getProductList = trans_.createadors(strstrQuery)
end function
'--------------------------------------------- 'Grzegorz Trawiński 'Funkcja zwraca dane o produktach w postaci recordset, 'na podstawie podanych indeksow produktow '-------------------------------------------- function getSelectedProductList(arrProduct) 'pobranie aktywnych magazynów dim strstrQuery, strSubstrQuery: strSubstrQuery = "" strstrQuery = "select IdObj,strNazwa from n5magazyn where mag_eAktywny = N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY" dim oRSMag: set oRSMag = trans_.createadors(strstrQuery)
dim strRec dim iter: iter = 1 do while not oRSMag.EOF strRec = "'idMagazyn" + CStr(iter) + "'=" + CStr(oRSMag(0).value) + "," + vbNewLine + "'strMagazynNazwa" + CStr(iter) + "'='" + CStr(oRSMag(1).value) + "'," + vbNewLine +_ "'intStan" + CStr(iter) + "'=(select isnull(cast(sum(gms_curIlosc) as int),cast(0 as int)) from n5gmstan where gms_pProd = vl.p_idobj and gms_pOpak = vl.c_idobj and gms_pMag = " + CStr(oRSMag(0).value) + ")" strSubstrQuery = strSubstrQuery + strRec if iter < oRSMag.recordCount then strSubstrQuery = strSubstrQuery + "," + vbNewLine end if iter = iter + 1 oRSMag.movenext loop
strstrQuery = _ "select * from " + vbNewLine +_ "(select 'longRowNumber'=(cast(row_number() over (order by vl.p_strindeks) as int)), " + vbNewLine +_ "'c_prod_idobj'=vl.p_idobj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'intIdOpakowanie'=vl.c_idobj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strIndeks'=vl.p_strindeks, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaProduktu'=vl.p_strnazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strGrupaProduktow'=gr.strNazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDetaNetto'=vl.c_curcenanetto1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDetaBrutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt1Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt1Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt2Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt2Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDeta4Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto4, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaDeta4Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto4, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt5Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto5, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt5Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto5, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt6Netto'=vl.c_curcenanetto6, " + vbNewLine +_ "'floCenaHurt6Brutto'=vl.c_curcenabrutto6, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strVat'=vl.p_evat, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strRodzaj'=vl.p_erodzaj, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strOpis'=vl.p_stropis, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha1'=vl.p_strcecha1, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha2'=vl.p_strcecha2, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strCecha3'=vl.p_strcecha3, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaOpakowania'=vl.c_strnazwa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strJednOpakowania'=j.strSkrot, " + vbNewLine +_ "'intIDGrupaProd'=vl.p_pgrupaprod, " + vbNewLine +_ "'eStatus'=vl.p_eaktywny, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaProduktuForeign'=vl.p_strnazwamiedzynarodowa, " + vbNewLine +_ "'strNazwaZamiennika'=isnull((select op.strnazwa from n5opakowanie_produktu op where op.idobj = vl.c_pzamiennik),'brak'), " + vbNewLine +_ "'lp'=vl.coll_lp, " + vbNewLine +_ + strSubstrQuery + vbNewLine +_ "from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania vl " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5grupaproduktow gr on vl.p_pgrupaprod = gr.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5jednostka j on vl.c_pJednOpak = j.idobj " + vbNewLine
strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ " where "
dim oElem for each oElem in arrProduct strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ "vl.p_strindeks = '" + cStr(oElem) + "' or " next
strstrQuery = Left(strstrQuery, Len(strstrQuery)-3)
strstrQuery = strstrQuery +_ ") as prod " + vbNewLine
set getSelectedProductList = trans_.createadors(strstrQuery)
end function
'--------------------------------------------- 'Grzegorz Trawiński 'Funkcja testowa '--------------------------------------------- function EBTest(byval intNumber): EBTest = "" EBTest = "Jeżeli widzisz ten napis, oznacza to, że EuroBuisness 5.0 " +_ "działa poprawnie. Liczba, która została podana to: " + CStr(intNumber) + "." end function
'--------------------------------------------- 'Grzegorz Trawiński 'Pobór cen dla klienta '--------------------------------------------- function get_cena(byval intClientId, byval intProductId, byval intOpakId, byval cena, byval n, byval bResInNetto): get_cena = ccur(cena) dim curValue dim pClient, pProdukt, pOpak dim curDummy dim nLP
if intClientId > clng(0) and intProductId > clng(0) and intOpakId > clng(0) then set pClient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,intClientID) if not pClient is nothing then set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , clng(intProductId))
nLP = pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(clng(intOpakId)) if nLP > clng(0) then set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(nLP) else exit function end if
if nx_compute_price(pClient, pProdukt, pOpak, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),1.00, n, _ nothing, bResInNetto, curDummy, curValue) then get_cena = curValue end if
end if end if end function
'messagebox "ok1", "Zakończono wysyłanie", vbOKOnly, vbInformation ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ' ECWS3 ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' function ecws3_is_alive(byval iTestValue) ecws3_is_alive = iTestValue end function
function ecws_get_trans() dim oTrans : set oTrans = trans_.get_this() set ecws_get_trans = oTrans end function
function ecws3_init(byval strUser,byval strPassword) ecws3_init = doc_.getmodule(60121).remote_system_init(strUser, strPassword) end function
function ecws3_open_recordset(strQuery) set ecws3_open_recordset = trans_.createadors(strQuery) end function
function ecws3_exec_sql(strSQL) trans_.execsql strSQL end function
function ecws3_save_document(oDocument) : ecws3_save_document = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown" dim pSubTrans: set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran()
select case oDocument.DocumentType case "SI" 'Sales Invoice ecws3_save_document = ecws3_save_sales_invoice(oDocument) case "SO","QR", "PO" 'Sales Order, "Quote Request", "Purchase Order" ecws3_save_document = ecws3_save_order(oDocument) case "GI", "GR", "IGR","IGI", "MOV" 'Good Issued Note,Good Received Note ecws3_save_document = ecws3_save_store_doc(oDocument) case "CR", "CD" 'Cash receipt, Cash Disbursement ecws3_save_document = ecws3_save_cash_doc(oDocument) end select end function
function ecws3_resolve_customer(CustomerID, CustomerCode) : ecws3_resolve_customer = clng(0)
dim idCustomer
if trim(cstr(CustomerID)) <> "" then idCustomer = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, "IdObj=" + trim(cstr(CustomerID))) if idCustomer > 0 then ecws3_resolve_customer = idCustomer exit function end if end if
if trim(CustomerCode) <> "" then idCustomer = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, "strIndeks='" + cstr(CustomerCode) + "'") if idCustomer > 0 then ecws3_resolve_customer = idCustomer exit function end if end if
end function
function ecws3_resolve_store(StoreID, StoreName) : ecws3_resolve_store = clng(0)
dim idStore
if trim(StoreID) <> "" then idStore = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, "IdObj=" + cstr(StoreID)) if idStore > 0 then ecws3_resolve_store = idStore exit function end if end if
if trim(StoreName) <> "" then idStore = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, "strNazwa='" + cstr(StoreName) + "'") if idStore > 0 then ecws3_resolve_store = idStore exit function end if end if
end function
function ecws3_resolve_city(CityName) ecws3_resolve_city = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC, "strNazwa='" + trim(cstr(CityName)) + "'") end function
function ecws3_resolve_product(ProductID, ProductCode) : ecws3_resolve_product = clng(0)
dim idProduct
if trim(cstr(ProductID)) <> "" then idProduct = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "IdObj=" + cstr(ProductID)) if idProduct > 0 then ecws3_resolve_product = idProduct exit function end if end if
if trim(cstr(ProductCode)) <> "" then idProduct = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "strIndeks='" + cstr(ProductCode)+"'") if idProduct > 0 then ecws3_resolve_product = idProduct exit function end if end if
end function
function ecws3_resolve_product_group(ProductGroupID, ProductGroupName) : ecws3_resolve_product_group = clng(0)
dim idProductGroup
if trim(cstr(ProductGroupID)) <> "" then idProductGroup = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW, "IdObj=" + cstr(ProductGroupID)) if idProductGroup > 0 then ecws3_resolve_product_group = idProductGroup exit function end if end if
if trim(cstr(ProductGroupName)) <> "" then idProductGroup = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW, "strNazwa='" + cstr(ProductGroupName)+"'") if idProductGroup > 0 then ecws3_resolve_product_group = idProductGroup exit function end if end if
end function
function ecws3_save_product(oProduct) : ecws3_save_product = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown" dim idProduct : idProduct = ecws3_resolve_product(oProduct.ID, oProduct.Code) if idProduct < 0 then ecws3_save_product = "003: Found many products. Cannot update." exit function end if
dim oEBProduct if idProduct = 0 then set oEBProduct = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT) else set oEBProduct = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, idProduct) end if
dim idUnit : idUnit = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA, "strSkrot='" + trim(oProduct.UnitAbbr) + "'")
if idUnit <= 0 then ecws3_save_product = "003: Unit " + cstr(oProduct.UnitAbbr) + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
dim idProductGroup : idProductGroup = ecws3_resolve_product_group(oProduct.ProductGroupID, oProduct.ProductGroupName)
if idProductGroup <= 0 then ecws3_save_product = "004: Product group " + cstr(oProduct.ProductGroupName) + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
with oEBProduct .strNazwa = oProduct.Name .strIndeks = oProduct.Code set .pGrupaProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW, idProductGroup) set .pJednostkaEwid = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA, idUnit)
.strCecha1 = trim(cstr(oProduct.Property1)) .strCecha2 = trim(cstr(oProduct.Property2)) .strCecha3 = trim(cstr(oProduct.Property3))
end with
if not trans_.saveobjects() then ecws3_save_product = "007: Cannot save product (business rule)" exit function end if
ecws3_save_product = "000:" + cstr(oEBProduct.IdObj) + ":" + oEBProduct.strIndeks
end function
function ecws3_save_customer(oCustomer) : ecws3_save_customer = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown" dim idCustomer : idCustomer = ecws3_resolve_customer(oCustomer.ID, oCustomer.Code)
if idCustomer < 0 then ecws3_save_customer = "003: Found many customers. Cannot update." exit function end if
dim oEBCustomer if idCustomer = 0 then if trim(oCustomer.NIP) = "" then trans_.var(APPVAR_KLIENT_TYPE) = N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA else trans_.var(APPVAR_KLIENT_TYPE) = N5KLIENT_FIRMA end if
set oEBCustomer = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT) else set oEBCustomer = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, idCustomer) end if dim idCity : idCity = ecws3_resolve_city(oCustomer.City) if idCity <= 0 then idCity = ecws3_resolve_city("nieznana") end if
with oEBCustomer oEBCustomer.strNazwa = oCustomer.Name if trans_.var(APPVAR_KLIENT_TYPE) = N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA then oEBCustomer.strNazwisko = oCustomer.Name oEBCustomer.strImie = "." end if
oEBCustomer.strSkrot = oCustomer.Code oEBCustomer.strIndeks = oCustomer.Code oEBCustomer.strNIP = oCustomer.NIP oEBCustomer.strUlica = oCustomer.Street oEBCustomer.strKod = oCustomer.ZIPCode oEBCustomer.strTel1 = oCustomer.Phone oEBCustomer.strEmail = oCustomer.Email
set oEBCustomer.pMiejscowosc = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC, idCity) set oEBCustomer.pGrupaKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT, trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT, "strNazwa='autorejestracja'")) oEBCustomer.strCecha3 = oCustomer.ExternalID end with
if not trans_.saveobjects() then ecws3_save_customer = "007: Cannot save customer (business rule)" exit function end if
ecws3_save_customer = "000:" + cstr(oEBCustomer.IdObj) + ":" + oEBCustomer.strIndeks
end function
function ecws3_save_order(oOrderData): ecws3_save_order = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown"
'------------- find customer ------------- dim idCustomer : idCustomer = ecws3_resolve_customer(oOrderData.CustomerID, oOrderData.CustomerCode) if idCustomer <= 0 then ecws3_save_order = "003: Customer not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
dim oCustomer set oCustomer = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, idCustomer)
'------------- find payment rule ------------- dim idPayment dim oPayment
set oPayment = oCustomer.pSposobPlatnosci if oPayment is nothing then idPayment = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT, "strNazwa='" + oOrderData.PaymentRule + "'") if idPayment <= 0 then ecws3_save_order = "003: Payment rule name " + oOrderData.PaymentRule + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oPayment = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT, idPayment) end if
'------------- find/create order ------------- dim idOrder dim oOrder dim bNewOrder : bNewOrder = false
if oOrderData.DocumentNumber = "" or left(oOrderData.DocumentNumber, 1) = "#" then 'check register for new orders dim idRegister : idRegister = getRejByNazwa(oOrderData.RegisterName) if idRegister <= 0 then ecws3_save_order = "004: Register named " + oOrderData.RegisterName + " not found. Cannot insert new order" exit function end if select case oOrderData.DocumentType case "SO" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE case "PO" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE case "QR" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK_ZAP_OFERTOWE_OBCE end select
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRegister
set oOrder = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE) oOrder.strNrDok = mid(oOrderData.DocumentNumber, 2) bNewOrder = true else idOrder = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE, "strNrDok = '" + oOrderData.DocumentNumber + "'") if idOrder <= 0 then ecws3_save_order = "002: Order " + oOrderData.DocumentNumber + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oOrder = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE, idOrder) end if
'------------- update order ------------- set oOrder.pKlient = oCustomer set oOrder.pSposobPlatnosci = oPayment oOrder.dDataWyst = oOrderData.IssueDate oOrder.dDataReal = oOrderData.CompletitionDate oOrder.strUwagi = oOrderData.Notes 'oOrder.strExtra1 = trim(cstr(oOrderData.Property1)) 'oOrder.strExtra2 = trim(cstr(oOrderData.Property2))
oOrder.zam_strNrDokObcy = oOrderData.PartnerDocumentNumber
#ifdef _IOW
if oOrderData.AllowPartialSO then oOrder.zam_cKomplet = "1" else oOrder.zam_cKomplet = "0" end if
if oOrderData.DeliveryModeID <> "" then set oOrder.zam_pSposobDostawy = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPOSDOST, clng(oOrderData.DeliveryModeID)) end if
#endif '-------------update order lines -------- dim iLine : iLine = 1 dim oOrderLineData dim oOrderLine
for each oOrderLineData in oOrderData.ArrLines if oOrder.listPozycje.exists(iLine) then set oOrderLine = oOrder.listPozycje.get(iLine) else set oOrderLine = oOrder.listPozycje.addnew() end if
'---- find product dim idProduct : idProduct = ecws3_resolve_product(oOrderLineData.ProductID, oOrderLineData.ProductCode) if idProduct <= 0 then ecws3_save_order = "004: Product at line " + cstr(iLine) + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
set oOrderLine.pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, idProduct)
if ccur(oOrderLineData.Quantity) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_order = "005: Quantity must be positive at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
oOrderLine.curIloscOpak = ccur(oOrderLineData.Quantity)
if ccur(oOrderLineData.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_order = "006: Unit Price must be non-negative at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
#ifdef _TANDEM_BAITS oOrderLine.curCenaBazowaBruttoWal = ccur(oOrderLineData.UnitPriceBruttoDocCur) oOrderLine.curRabat = ccur(10.0) #else
'--- use default when not supplied if ccur(oOrderLineData.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) > ccur(0.0) then oOrderLine.curCenaBazowaNettoWal = ccur(oOrderLineData.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) end if #endif
iLine = iLine + 1 next
'------- remove exceeding positions ------ do while oOrder.listPozycje.count() >= iLine oOrder.listPozycje.delete(oOrder.listPozycje.count()) loop
if not trans_.saveobjects() then ecws3_save_order = "007: Cannot save order (business rule)" exit function end if
#ifdef _IOW if bNewOrder and oOrderData.DocumentType = "SO" then dim oM60226 : set oM60226 = doc_.getmodule(60226) dim bRezRes: bRezRes = oM60226.utworz_dokmag_z_dokhandl_automat(oOrder, N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE, 0, 0, oOrder.pRejestrDok.wrefParam2.idobj) end if #endif
ecws3_save_order = "000:" + cstr(oOrder.IdObj) + ":" + oOrder.strNrDok
end function
function ecws3_save_sales_invoice(oDocument): ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown"
'------------- find customer ------------- dim idCustomer : idCustomer = ecws3_resolve_customer(oDocument.CustomerID, oDocument.CustomerCode) if idCustomer <= 0 then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "003: Customer not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
dim oCustomer set oCustomer = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, idCustomer)
'------------- find payment rule ------------- dim idPayment dim oPayment
set oPayment = oCustomer.pSposobPlatnosci if oPayment is nothing then idPayment = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT, "strNazwa='" + oDocument.PaymentRule + "'") if idPayment <= 0 then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "003: Payment rule name " + oDocument.PaymentRule + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oPayment = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT, idPayment) end if
'------------- find/create Invoice ------------- dim idInvoice dim oInvoice
if oDocument.DocumentNumber = "" or left(oDocument.DocumentNumber, 1) = "#" then 'check register for new orders dim idRegister : idRegister = getRejByNazwa(oDocument.RegisterName) if idRegister <= 0 then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "004: Register named " + oDocument.RegisterName + " not found. Cannot insert new invoice" exit function end if trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRegister
set oInvoice = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ) oInvoice.strNrDok = mid(oDocument.DocumentNumber, 2) else idInvoice = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, "strNrDok = '" + oDocument.DocumentNumber + "'") if idInvoice <= 0 then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "002: Invoice " + oDocument.DocumentNumber + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oInvoice = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, idInvoice) end if
'------------- update Invoice ------------- set oInvoice.pKlient = oCustomer set oInvoice.pSposobPlatnosci = oPayment oInvoice.dDataWyst = oDocument.IssueDate oInvoice.strUwagi = oDocument.Notes
oInvoice.strExtra1 = trim(cstr(oDocument.property1)) oInvoice.strExtra2 = trim(cstr(oDocument.property2))
'-------------update order lines -------- dim iLine : iLine = 1 dim oDocumentLine dim oInvoiceLine
for each oDocumentLine in oDocument.ArrLines if oInvoice.listPozycje.exists(iLine) then set oInvoiceLine = oInvoice.listPozycje.get(iLine) else set oInvoiceLine = oInvoice.listPozycje.addnew() end if
'---- find product dim idProduct : idProduct = ecws3_resolve_product(oDocumentLine.ProductID, oDocumentLine.ProductCode) if idProduct <= 0 then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "004: Product at line " + cstr(iLine) + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
set oInvoiceLine.pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, idProduct)
if ccur(oDocumentLine.Quantity) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "005: Quantity must be positive at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
oInvoiceLine.curIloscOpak = ccur(oDocumentLine.Quantity)
if ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "006: Unit Price must be non-negative at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
'--- use default when not supplied if ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) > ccur(0.0) then oInvoiceLine.curCenaBazowaNettoWal = ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) end if
iLine = iLine + 1 next
'------- remove exceeding positions ------ do while oInvoice.listPozycje.count() >= iLine oInvoice.listPozycje.delete(oInvoice.listPozycje.count()) loop
if not trans_.saveobjects() then ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "007: Cannot save sales invoice (business rule)" exit function end if
ecws3_save_sales_invoice = "000:" + cstr(oInvoice.IdObj) + ":" + oInvoice.strNrDok
end function
function ecws3_save_store_doc(oDocument): ecws3_save_store_doc = "001: Cannot save - reason unknown"
'------------- find customer ------------- dim oCustomer : set oCustomer = nothing
select case oDocument.DocumentType case "GI", "GR" dim idCustomer : idCustomer = ecws3_resolve_customer(oDocument.CustomerID, oDocument.CustomerCode)
if idCustomer <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "003: Customer/Supplier not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
set oCustomer = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, idCustomer)
end select '------------- find/create Store Doc ------------- dim idStoreDoc dim oStoreDoc
if oDocument.DocumentNumber = "" or left(oDocument.DocumentNumber, 1) = "#" then 'check register for new orders dim idRegister : idRegister = getRejByNazwa(oDocument.RegisterName) if idRegister <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "004: Register named " + oDocument.RegisterName + " not found. Cannot insert new store document" exit function end if
select case oDocument.DocumentType case "GI" 'Good Issued Note trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) case "GR" 'Good Received Note trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PZ) case "IGR" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) case "IGI" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) case "MOV" trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__MM) end select
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRegister
set oStoreDoc = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) oStoreDoc.strNrDok = mid(oDocument.DocumentNumber, 2)
'since 16.03.23.0 oStoreDoc.nNumOper = clng(oDocument.StoreOperationNumber)
else idStoreDoc = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, "strNrDok = '" + oDocument.DocumentNumber + "'") if idStoreDoc <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "002: Store document " + oDocument.DocumentNumber + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oStoreDoc = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, idStoreDoc) end if
'------------- resolve stores ------------- dim idStore dim oStore select case oDocument.DocumentType case "GI", "IGI", "MOV" 'Good Issued Note idStore = ecws3_resolve_store(oDocument.SourceStoreID, oDocument.SourceStoreName) if idStore <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "003: Store not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oStoreDoc.pMagZrod = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, idStore) end select
select case oDocument.DocumentType case "GR","IGR", "MOV" 'Good Received Note idStore = ecws3_resolve_store(oDocument.DestinationStoreID, oDocument.DestinationStoreName) if idStore <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "003: Store not found. Cannot save" exit function end if set oStoreDoc.pMagDocel = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, idStore) end select
'------------- update StoreDoc ------------- set oStoreDoc.pKlient = oCustomer oStoreDoc.dDataWyst = oDocument.IssueDate oStoreDoc.strUwagi = oDocument.Notes
oStoreDoc.strExtra1 = trim(cstr(oDocument.property1)) oStoreDoc.strExtra2 = trim(cstr(oDocument.property2))
'-------------update StoreDoc lines -------- dim iLine : iLine = 1 dim oDocumentLine dim oStoreDocLine
for each oDocumentLine in oDocument.ArrLines if oStoreDoc.listPozycje.exists(iLine) then set oStoreDocLine = oStoreDoc.listPozycje.get(iLine) else set oStoreDocLine = oStoreDoc.listPozycje.addnew() end if
'---- find product dim idProduct : idProduct = ecws3_resolve_product(oDocumentLine.ProductID, oDocumentLine.ProductCode) if idProduct <= 0 then ecws3_save_store_doc = "004: Product at line " + cstr(iLine) + " not found. Cannot save" exit function end if
set oStoreDocLine.pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, idProduct)
if ccur(oDocumentLine.Quantity) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_store_doc = "005: Quantity must be positive at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
oStoreDocLine.curIloscOpak = ccur(oDocumentLine.Quantity)
if ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) < ccur(0.0) then ecws3_save_store_doc = "006: Unit Price must be non-negative at line " + cstr(iLine) + ". Cannot save" exit function end if
'--- use default when not supplied if ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) > ccur(0.0) then oStoreDocLine.curCenaMag = ccur(oDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur) end if
iLine = iLine + 1 next
'------- remove exceeding positions ------ do while oStoreDoc.listPozycje.count() >= iLine oStoreDoc.listPozycje.delete(oStoreDoc.listPozycje.count()) loop
oStoreDoc.cInternalAllowChanges = "1"
if not trans_.saveobjects() then ecws3_save_store_doc = "007: Cannot save store document due some business rule." exit function end if
ecws3_save_store_doc = "000:" + cstr(oStoreDoc.IdObj) + ":" + oStoreDoc.strNrDok
end function
function ecws3_save_cash_doc(oDocument) ecws3_save_store_doc = "999: not implemented" end function
function ecws3_get_price(oPriceRequest) : ecws3_get_price = ccur(-9999.99) dim idCustomer : idCustomer = ecws3_resolve_customer(oPriceRequest.CustomerID, oPriceRequest.CustomerCode) dim idProduct : idProduct = ecws3_resolve_product(oPriceRequest.ProductID, oPriceRequest.ProductCode)
dim oEBCustomer : set oEBCustomer = nothing if idCustomer > 0 then set oEBCustomer = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, idCustomer) if oPriceRequest.PriceListNr = -1 then oPriceRequest.PriceListNr = oEBCustomer.kli_eZestawCenowy end if end if
if oPriceRequest.PriceListNr = -1 then oPriceRequest.PriceListNr = 1 end if
dim oEBProduct : set oEBProduct = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , idProduct) dim oEBOpak : set oEBOpak = oEBProduct.listOpakowania.get(1)
dim curPrice, curDummy
if nx_compute_price(oEBCustomer, oEBProduct, oEBOpak, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY), 1.00, oPriceRequest.PriceListNr, _ nothing, not oPriceRequest.Brutto, curDummy, curPrice) then ecws3_get_price = curPrice end if
end function
function ecws3_get_invoice_as_pdf(byval idSprzedaz) trans_.var(3223) = clng(1) dim oM60151: set oM60151 = doc_.getmodule(60151) dim oSprzedaz: set oSprzedaz = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, idSprzedaz)
dim strDPC : strDPC = "Faktura VAT do PDF"
select case oSprzedaz.pRejestrDok.eTyp case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP strDPC = "Faktura VAT korekta do PDF" case N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_EXP strDPC = "Faktura zagraniczna do PDF" case N5REJESTRDOK_WDT strDPC = "WDT do PDF" case N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT strDPC = "WDT korekta do PDF" end select
dim idDPC : idDPC = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC, "strNazwa='" + strDPC + "'")
dim strFileName ecws3_get_invoice_as_pdf = oM60151.create_pdf(oSprzedaz, idDPC, strFileName, false) end function
